function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0006
alias: helios_backfill_intake_audit
issued_on: 2025-11-19
total_eur: 520
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 520
---
# Helios intake audit invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0006                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_intake_audit   |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-19                     |
| total_eur      | 520                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 2   | 260      | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 520      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from the first phase when the work was mostly diagnosis and process-mapping.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully: added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice file while preserving the original note body verbatim, then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant nested AGENTS and workflow/schema docs before task work, obeyed explicit inbox file list, preserved body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox instruction in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR/frontmatter extraction for exactly one file: 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. The target file visibly contained all required invoice fields and line-item values; these were extracted into frontmatter per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with original content retained below the closing delimiter per migration workflow. After completion, inbox file deletion was performed as required by process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
